name: priceos_new_neighborhood_tools
description: OpenAI function/tool schemas for new CRO Router neighborhood tools.

function.name: get_nearby_comps
function.description: Fetch nearby competitor listings within a radius using haversine distance, with neighborhood ADR percentiles (P25/P50/P75/P90).

apiKey.description: Shared API key for tool authentication.

bedrooms.description: Bedroom count to match competitor set.

month.description: Target month in YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-01 format.

marketId.description: Market id used by backend market datasets.

limit.description: Max number of nearby competitor listings.

function.name: get_listing_perf
function.description: Fetch month-by-month performance history for one competitor listing.

apiKey.description: Shared API key for tool authentication.

marketId.description: Market id used by backend competitor performance datasets.

listingId.description: Airbtics listing id for a selected competitor.

month.description: Optional month in YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-01; omit to return all available months.
